title: SkinLayers3D-CustomSkinLoader-Bridge
description: Fixed the compatibility issue between the CustomSkinLoader mod and the 3D Skin Layers mod since Minecraft 1.21.4
body:
**Resolved Compatibility Conflict Between CustomSkinLoader and 3D Skin Layers Mods**

A compatibility issue affecting both the CustomSkinLoader and 3D Skin Layers mods has been addressed. This conflict, which emerged following the Minecraft 1.21.4 update, caused rendering inconsistencies and potential client crashes when the two mods operated simultaneously. The fix involved restructuring their texture-loading interactions to prevent resource contention. Post-resolution testing confirms stable concurrent operation of both mods under Minecraft versions 1.21.4 and newer.
